variants.title: Filtrec A421G40 Spin-On Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A421G40. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A421G40 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 32µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 35µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 117.0 mm, Length: 297.5 mm, Thread: 1 3/4"-12 UN 2B, Δ Collapse Pressure: 24 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 32µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Collapse Pressure: 24 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Donaldson P165672 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax | Replaces the Filtrec A421G40
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P165672 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax | Replaces the Filtrec A421G40
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P165672 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On Duramax combines the convenience of a spin-on filter with the robust durability of Donaldsonâ€™s Duramax line. It offers high-efficiency filtration, effectively removing contaminants while withstanding high-pressure environments. Its spin-on design simplifies maintenance, allowing for quick and easy filter changes. Built for heavy-duty applications, this filter provides reliable performance in demanding hydraulic systems, helping to extend equipment life and reduce downtime.

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 66672 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A421G40
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 66672 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A421G40
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 66672 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 121.5 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 117.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 86.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"3/4-12UNF, Height 1 (H1): 297.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 294.5 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 32µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 35µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 117.0 mm, Length: 297.5 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Thread: 1 3/4"-12 UN 2B, Collapse Pressure: 24 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C
